message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice, and this conversation is being logged. I’m sorry to hear that. I will note that you are unable to pay this month. To discuss the account ending in ****1184, please confirm your full name.
I already told you I can’t pay, and I’m not comfortable giving more info right now.

Understood. I will note that you are unable to pay this month and that you are not comfortable providing more information right now. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

{"from_stage": "ASSESSMENT", "to_stage": "RESOLUTION", "summary": "Disclosures already provided in chat: AI identity and logging disclosed. Debt context established in privacy-safe way as account ending ****1184 with amount due confirmed from tools at 8400. Verification not completed because borrower declined to provide additional information. Borrower stated they cannot pay this month and is not comfortable giving more info right now. Treat as hardship/inability-to-pay signal and boundary signal. No negotiation or payment arrangements discussed. Do not repeat disclosures or re-ask chat assessment questions already answered. Next step: phone contact to discuss available next steps for this account while respecting the borrower\u2019s stated reluctance to provide more information in chat."}

There’s nothing to discuss by phone either—I’m unemployed and I’m not promising any payment.

Understood. I’ve noted that you’re unemployed and not able to commit to any payment at this time, and that you do not want phone discussion. No payment arrangement was set today. We will record your position and contact preference for this account.
